---
description: validation runs
applyTo: '**'

# always
cargo fmt
printf 'acpi reboot\n' | nc 192.168.178.94 4245
make iso
# for shell (ai)
until nc 192.168.178.94 4245; do sleep 1; done
# for bootlog
until nc 192.168.178.94 1; do sleep 1; done

afterwards you can see in terminal the logs

# we care
